for addr in 222098 222234 19bac0 19bc14; do
  target=$((16#$addr))
  best=""
  best_off=999999999
  while read saddr ssize sname; do
    sa=$((16#$saddr))
    ss=$((16#$ssize))
    if [ $sa -le $target ] && [ $((sa + ss)) -gt $target ]; then
      off=$((target - sa))
      printf "#xx pc 0x%s => %s+0x%x\n" "$addr" "$sname" "$off"
      break
    fi
  done < dynsyms.txt
done
